Package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.service.converter.emediplan

package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.service.converter.emediplan
  • Class
    Description
    ChMed16ABaseConverter<M extends ChMed16AMedicament,E extends ChMed16AEMediplan<M>>
    Utility class to convert CH EMED EPR documents to an eMediplan object equivalent according to the CHMED16A specifications.
    ChMed16AConverter
     
    ChMed23AConverter
    Utility class to convert CH EMED EPR documents to an eMediplan object equivalent according to the CHMED23A specifications.
    EMediplanConverter
     
    EMediplanMedicationResolver
    This is an interface for a service that can return a FHIR ChEmedEprMedication resource from a provided eMediplan medication identifier: free text (no identifier) GTIN HCI index pharmacode HCI index product number (not valid for prescriptions)
    EMediplanMedicationResolver.MedicationNotFoundException
     
    EMediplanMedicationResolver.NoOpMedicationResolver
    Extremely basic medication resolver that only supports free text medication specification.
    EPrescriptionConverter
    Specialized version of the CHMED16A converter that deals with the ePrescription format as defined by the latest revision supported by this module (see EPrescription).
    TreatmentPlanResolver
    This is an interface for a service that can return a FHIR ChEmedExtTreatmentPlan resource from a provided CH EMED EPR Medication Request.
